title: ProDec 2 inch x 50m Multi Surface Masking Tape For Painting, Painters Tape for Sharp Paint Lines, Decorators Tapes, Painters Masking Tapes 50mm Wide
features: 2" (50mm) width x 50m length general purpose painting tape made from high quality crepe paper that is easy to tear by hand and is compatible with all standard paint types including emulsion ,eggshell, gloss, satin and undercoat
Decorating tape ideal for masking walls and ceilings; wood surfaces such as skirting boards, architraves and window sills; metal, glass, mouldings, switches, sockets and more
Suitable for indoor painting and decorating, the paper tape applies evenly and releases smoothly when peeled, leaving no residue and giving a clean, crisp paint line
Standard adhesion grade which is ideal for both bare and previously painted surfaces where the paint has fully cured (more than 28 days)

Useful tips: always test a small, unobtrusive area first to check the condition of your surface and remove tape after painting - ideally before paint dries to prevent any skin forming over the join between the tape and the painted surface (max 24 hours after application)
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint This general purpose masking tape is made from high quality crepe paper that is easy to tear by hand, enabling quick and convenient coverage of both long and short runs. It has standard adhesion grade which is ideal for both bare and previously painted surfaces where the paint has fully cured (more than 28 days), applies evenly and releases smoothly when peeled, leaving no residue. It is suitable for walls, wood surfaces such as skirting boards, architraves and window sills, metal, glass, mouldings, switches, sockets and more. Top tips for best results with masking tape Apply the tape with even but not excessive pressure Tape should ideally be removed before the paint dries, to prevent any paint skin forming over the join between the tape and the painted surface, and within a maximum of 24 hours after application Always try a small, unobtrusive area first to check compatibility with the surface For delicate or newly painted surfaces, a low tack grade should be used to avoid surface damage Some wallpapers such as painted or highly patterned papers may not be suitable for masking tape - always test first and do not apply with excessive pressure Masking & Warning Tape solutions from ProDec When it comes to masking off areas to protect against unwanted paint marks, flicks and splashes, ProDec has you covered. Our range of masking tapes includes standard and low tack adhesion grades, and we can help you get sharp paint lines with no bleed even on newly painted and delicate surfaces. Our barrier tapes enable you to mark out newly painted or restricted zones in public areas. Precision Edge - standard Made with premium quality Japanese rice paper, Precision Edge masking tape makes achieving razor sharp paint lines simple, protecting surfaces quickly and easily and preventing unwanted paint marks, flicks and splashes. The standard grade is ideal for bare and previously painted surfaces where the paint has fully cured (more than 28 days). Precision Edge - low tack A lower strength adhesive than Standard grade, Low Tack Precision Edge masking tape is ideal for newly painted (less than 28 days) and delicate surfaces where gentle adhesion is required without surface damage. Precision Edge - UV grade UV Resistant Precision Edge masking tape is ideal for hot spots such as conservatories, south facing windows, etc. to prevent excessive adhesion or 'baking on' caused by heat. Plus a low tack adhesive makes it ideal for newly painted (less than 28 days) and delicate surfaces. General purpose masking tape Made from high quality crepe paper that is easy to tear by hand, general purpose masking tape applies evenly and releases smoothly when peeled, leaving no residue. Standard adhesion ideal for bare and previously painted surfaces where the paint has fully cured (more than 28 days). General purpose low tack masking tape Made from high quality crepe paper that is easy to tear by hand, with a low tack adhesive that won't damage newly painted (less than 28 days) and delicate surfaces when removed. It has good resistance to paint bleed, giving a crisp line and no residue when peeled. Long Life masking tape Top quality crepe paper that is heat treated to give excellent barrier properties, featuring a high performance adhesive that is resistant to UV light and heat resistant up to 100°F/38°C, enabling it to be removed up to 21 days after application. Standard adhesion grade. Wet Paint tape Waterproof, non-adhesive barrier tape with a highly visible yellow colour and black ‘Wet Paint’ writing, ideal for highlighting areas that have been freshly painted to prevent people from making accidental contact. Suitable for both interior and exterior use and supplied in a handy dispenser box for rapid application. Barrier tape Waterproof, non-adhesive barrier tape with a highly visible red and white chevron pattern, ideal for marking out temporary obstacles and restricted areas in construction sites and public areas. Suitable for both interior and exterior use and supplied in a handy dispenser box for rapid application.
